kale-salad-with-persimmons-feta-and-cris.name: Kale Salad With Persimmons, Feta, And Crisp Prosciutto

ingredients.prep: creamy feta cheese, such as Bulgarian

instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. Lay out prosciutto slices on a rimmed baking sheet. Bake until almost crisp, 16–18 minutes. Transfer to wire rack and let cool completely on baking sheet (prosciutto will continue to crisp as it cools). Crumble and set aside.
Meanwhile, spread pecans on a rimmed baking sheet and toast in oven, tossing once or twice, until fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Set aside.
Whisk lime juice, mustard, shallot, honey, garlic, 1 tsp. salt, and 1/4 tsp. pepper in a medium bowl, then whisk in oil in a slow, steady stream. Set aside.

In a large mixing bowl, combine kale with about 3/4 of the dressing and use your hands to massage dressing into kale. Add more dressing as needed (you may not need all of it). Reserve any leftover dressing for another use.

Add half of the persimmons, feta, mint, and prosciutto, toss together to combine, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Transfer to a serving bowl, and top with pecans and remaining persimmons, feta, mint, and prosciutto.

Dressing can be prepared 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Nuts can be toasted and chopped 1 day ahead; cover and keep at room temperature. Kale can be sliced 1 day ahead; place in an airtight container and chill. Salad can be tossed together 30 minutes ahead; keep at room temperature.

karens-fried-green-tomatoes.name: Karen's Fried Green Tomatoes
instructions: Season each tomato slice with sugar, salt, and pepper.
Beat milk and eggs together in a bowl. Pour flour into another bowl.

Gently press each tomato slice into flour to coat; shake off excess flour. Dip tomato slices into egg mixture, then press again into flour. Place breaded tomato slices onto a plate while breading the rest; do not stack.

Melt 1/2 cup butter in a large pan over medium heat. Place tomato slices in melted butter and cook until golden brown on one side, 5 to 7 minutes. Flip and cook on the other side until golden brown. Add more butter as need while frying.

kens-kickin-posole.name: Ken's Kickin' Posole
instructions: Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Place poblanos, cut-sides-down, onto the prepared baking sheet. Broil until skins blackened and blistered, about 5 minutes. Transfer poblanos to a bowl; tightly seal with plastic wrap. Allow peppers to steam as they cool, about 20 minutes. Remove and discard skins. Dice poblanos; set aside.

Cook bacon in a large pot over medium heat, stirring often, until fat renders and beginning to crisp, about 5 minutes. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate; discard all but 1 tablespoon drippings from the pot.

Increase heat to medium-high; add pork to the pot. Cook until browned on all sides, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Transfer pork to a plate; reduce heat to medium. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until onion has softened and is beginning to brown, about 5 minutes.

Add poblanos, jalapeños, cilantro, cumin, oregano, chile powder, salt, and cloves to the pot; cook for 1 minute. Add chicken stock, enchilada sauce, bacon, and pork; bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 1 hour. Stir in hominy; cover the pot. Cook until pork is very tender, about 1 hour more.

kibby-kibby-bel-saneeya.name: Kibby (kibby-bel-saneeya)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Soak wheat in a bowl of warm water until water is slightly absorbed, about 25 minutes. Drain and squeeze out excess moisture.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 10x14-inch baking dish.
Mix soaked wheat, ground beef, onion, lemon juice, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper together in a bowl. Spread mixture in the prepared baking dish; top with butter and pine nuts.
Bake in the preheated oven until ground beef is no longer pink, about 25 minutes. Turn on oven's broiler; broil until top is browned, 5 minutes.

kidney-beans-with-olives-on-a-bed-of-let.name: Kidney Beans With Olives On A Bed Of Lettuce
instructions: 1. Cook the water and drain the water to stay in the bar.
2. Sauce the onions you eat in the olive oil until pink.
3. Add the peppers that you have eaten garlic and cube, the barbunya, mushrooms and sliced green olives, and add 7-8 minutes more.
4. Taste with salt and spices.
5. Take it out of January and leave it to spoil.
6. Place the Marul leaves in hot water and lightly soften and put it in the bottom of an oven container, which you lightly lubricated.
7. Add and mix the chopped barbunian cheese and the parsleys you thin.
8. Take the Barbunian harper on the marul leaves and close it over with sarkan leaves.
9. Preheated 200 degree cook in oven for 10-15 minutes.
10. Serve hot.

korean-fried-chicken-honey-mustard-recip.name: Korean Fried Chicken Honey Mustard Recipe
korean-fried-chicken-honey-mustard-recip.original_name: Fried Chicken Honey Mustard (Korea Sauced Ball Harded Fried Chicken) Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 gr chicken wings or but (according to the preference of without any skin or bone)
1 cup of butter (optional, for creamy taste)

instructions: 1. Wash and dry chicken polishes.
2. Taste salt, pepper and optional garlic powder.
3. Bute chickens into flour and corn starch mixture, make sure each side is covered.
4. Medium to the pan or fritö in heat.
5. Up to 8–10 minutes fry, then paper towel uniform.
6. Wheat mix honey, mustard, mayonnaise, peel sauce and lemon juice in a bowl.
7. Take the fried chickens in a large bowl, add the ball hardal sauce and mix thoroughly, ensure that each side of the dough is covered with the sauce.
8. Serve with fresh vegetables or rice besides hot.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

kozanitiki-rice-pie-or-brides-bureki-arg.name: Kozanitiki Rice Pie Or Bride's Bureki
kozanitiki-rice-pie-or-brides-bureki-arg.original_name: Ρυζόπιτα Κοζανίτικη ή Μπουρέκι της νύφης

ingredients.item: 250 gruel fresh melted (or half olive oil - butter)
250 gruel fresh melted (or half olive oil - butter)

instructions: Rinse the rice first in a fine colander until the water comes out transparent.
Sprinkle with lemon juice.
Boil the water with butter, in a pot and add the rice and the yolk Kozani.
Allow to simmer on low heat for 15-20 minutes.
Add the first cup of sugar and continue building for 15 minutes.
Beat the second cup of sugar, cinnamon and almond in the blender.
In a buttered, shelled baking pan for pie, spread 1 village Leaf.
Brush with melted butter all over the surface.
Sprinkle with almond cinnamon.
Repeat with a layer of Leaf, spread butter and sprinkle with almond cinnamon.
In the same way, put the first three leads on the baking pan.
Spread on a layer the rice filling and straighten the surface.
Repeat 2 layerers of leaves, butter, cinnamon sugar and cover the rice pie with the last sheet.
Sprinkle the surface into baklava pieces.
Add the remaining butter and sprinkle with plenty of water, fluffy, with the Fingers.
